allow:
Bash(git commit -m "$\(cat <<''EOF''
Complete Digital FTE HR Platform - Foundation, API, Job Search, and Resume Builder Agents

Initial commit implementing the full Digital FTE HR platform with 4 major components:

## 1. Foundation \(Database + Types + LLM\)
- Prisma schema with 16+ core tables \(users, profiles, jobs, applications, channels, audit logs, GDPR\)
- Comprehensive type system with Zod validation schemas
- 40+ constants \(ATS thresholds, auto-apply limits, rate limiting\)
- Utility functions: JWT auth, PII masking, rate limiting, audit logging, GDPR compliance
- Claude API wrapper with exponential backoff, cost tracking, JSON validation

## 2. API Backend \(30+ REST Endpoints\)
- Middleware stack: auth, rate-limit, validation, plan-gate, context, error handling
- 6 route modules: auth, jobs, resumes, applications, channels, dashboard
- Safety-critical auto-apply flow with mandatory user approval gate \(1-hour expiration\)
- Plan-tier gating \(free/pro/elite\) with daily limits
- Comprehensive error handling with standardized codes
- Full audit logging with PII sanitization

## 3. Job Search Agent \(Multi-Platform Scraping\)
- 6 platform scrapers: LinkedIn, Indeed, Glassdoor, NaukriGulf, Bayt, Rozee.pk
- Semantic job matching with 4-dimension scoring \(semantic, skills, role, location\)
- Cross-platform deduplication using Claude for semantic matching
- Ghost job detection with heuristics + Claude analysis
- LangGraph workflow orchestration
- Standalone CLI entry point with example usage

## 4. Resume Builder Agent \(6-Agent Optimization Pipeline\)
- Multi-source extraction: PDF \(heuristic parsing\), form-based \(structured JSON\)
- 6 optimization agents running in parallel:
  * Linguistic Agent: Grammar, clarity, passive voice
  * ATS Keyword Agent: Job description keyword gap analysis
  * Impact Agent: CAR/STAR framework enhancement with metrics
  * Customization Agent: Job-specific tailoring and reordering
  * Formatting Agent: ATS-safe formatting checks
  * Authenticity Agent: Detects AI-generated phrases, clichés \(runs last\)
- ATS compatibility scoring with 23 checkpoints across 5 categories
  * Formatting \(5\), Structure \(5\), Content \(6\), Keywords \(4\), Design \(3\)
  * Thresholds: RED \(<60\) blocks export, YELLOW \(60-74\) warns, GREEN \(75+\) optimized
- Export to multiple formats: TXT, PDF \(reportlab\), DOCX \(python-docx\)
- Comprehensive documentation and CLI entry point

## Architecture Highlights
- Monorepo structure with pnpm workspaces \(packages, apps, services\)
- Async/await throughout for non-blocking operations
- LangGraph for agent orchestration and state management
- Type-safe validation at all system boundaries
- PII protection: masking in logs, sanitization for LLM inputs
- GDPR compliance: deletion cascade registry, retention policies
- Plan-tier enforcement: freemium model with feature gating
- Rate limiting: token bucket algorithm \(in-memory + Redis ready\)

## Key Metrics
- Job Search: 6 platforms, 15+ rate-limited endpoints, dedup + ghost detection
- Resume Optimization: 6 agents, 23 ATS checkpoints, 16-24s end-to-end processing
- API Backend: 30+ endpoints, 5 middleware layers, mandatory approval gates
- Database: 16+ tables with GDPR compliance tracking

🤖 Generated with Claude Code
Co-Authored-By: Claude Haiku 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
EOF
\)")
